description:
~" An UU RPG based of the first Season! "~

YAP YAP YAP part

so... this was requested some more time ago and has been sitting on my notes for a while bcs i had to think it through. And i came up with THE solution to make my life just a little easier making this. 1, i based this UU RPG off of the first Season (invis mafia arc) and not everything mixed together, ykyk. And 2, i only included a bit more known chars from UU. You will find all the chars that i included beneath!

Additional ✨information✨

i have included: Wemmbu, ParrotX2, SpokeIsHere, Flamefrags, ManePear, Eggchan, Mapicc, Ashswagg, Wifies, Minutetech, Planetlord, TheobaldTheBird, PrinceZam, ClownPierce. I was thinking abt adding Wato, Leow0ok and Kenadian, but i'm not sure. Lmk if i should add these two!!

Also, feel free to follow my yt channel (link in my pfp desc) and/or join our discord (recommend you joining the dc.. there are lots of nice peeps there)

The end is nigh.

The end is N U L L.
